reviews.comment:
No nos alojamos en el parador pero sí, cenamos tanto de ida como de vuelta cuando nos fuimos de vacaciones a Bariloche en enero de 2016, la comida muy abundante y fresca, el asado de tira y las pastas espectaculares, el precio, más que razonable, para recomendar

(Translated by Google)
We did not stay at the inn, but we did have dinner there both on the way there and back when we went on vacation to Bariloche in January 2016. The food was abundant and fresh, the grilled steak and pasta were spectacular, and the price was more than reasonable, and I would recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRNF9xZGNBEAE
